subject: Urgent Request: Scala Developer
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: Vaultix
ROLE: Mid Scala Developer
START: ASAP
DURATION: 12 months
LOCATION: Stockholm / hybrid
RATE: 900 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Scala, GCP, Docker and PostgreSQL.

Key requirements:

  • Scala
  • GCP
  • Docker
  • PostgreSQL

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Maja Gustafsson
Tech Talent Specialist
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 72 122 34 56
